validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK). Restore first: dotnet restore. Available targets: net8.0, net9.0, net10.0. net9.0/net8.0 require restore before first build.

completed_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: reduce allocations in BFSTestNodeVisitor path tracking and CreateWrappedName
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate allocations in PropertyBag.SingleOrDefault and IProperty[] FrameworkEngineMetadata lookups

backlog.title: AbortForMaxFailedTestsExtension: LINQ Any with lambda vs Array.IndexOf
backlog.notes: Uses .Any(t => t == ...) with delegate allocation; Array.IndexOf would be more consistent

backlog.title: PropertyBag.Single<T>(): triple-iterates matchingValues (Any, Skip(1).Any, First) - each allocates state machine
backlog.notes: Could use same direct-walk pattern as the new SingleOrDefault<T>(). Three state machines per call vs 0.

backlog.title: BFSTestNodeVisitor.CreatePropertyBagForFilter: new PropertyBag per node
backlog.notes: Called for every node when TreeNodeFilter is active. Creates a new PropertyBag each time. Could cache or reuse.
